profile_database.name: Jonathan Solomon
profile_database.summary: Builds software where AI, hardware, and physical space collide.

profile_database.label: Clicky

profile_database.label: Prism Labs
profile_database.summary: An ambient OS for physical space that turns a room into a computer without a headset.

profile_database.label: Apple Vision Pro lab systems

profile_database.label: Background

profile_database.label: Interests
profile_database.summary: Cameras, robots, projectors, rooms, AI, and physical systems that touch the real world.
